case_title: STEVE FELDMAN VS. UNITED NATIVE DEPOSITORY CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FELDMAN, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED NATIVE DEPOSITORY CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDMAN, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED NATIVE DEPOSITORY CORPORATION $24,678.48 PRINCIPAL, $189.62 INTEREST, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,979.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
